options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <capacitance_value> # Capacitance value (float, required) <object_list> # List of objects: ports or nets

options.name: -pin_load
options.description: Specifies the external pin capacitance for a port

options.name: -subtract_pin_load
options.description: can be used only if nets are in object list

options.name: -wire_load
options.description: Interprets the specified capacitance as the external wire capacitance of the port
